marquee.bannerLine: Free shipping over ₪200 · 30-day returns · Hand-wrapped orders · Ships within 2 days

home.heroSubheadline: Natural wellness products, hand-picked by Yarit
home.heroPoetic: A small shop of products I actually love — chosen by one hand, for a gentle ritual and a quiet routine.
home.featuredSubheadline: The products I love most, carefully chosen for you

hero.lead: Small-batch aloe, bee, and botanical formulas. Hand-selected by Yarit since 2009, shipped across Israel in tissue-wrapped packages.

featured.lead: Eight small-batch favorites, stocked fresh and tied with twine.

story.p1: Yarit started this shop from her kitchen in Tel Aviv with a single aloe leaf and a recipe from her grandmother. Every product still passes through her hands before it reaches yours.
story.p2: We never rush a formula. Ingredients are foraged or sourced from small Israeli producers, mixed in batches of forty, and rested for two weeks before labeling.

ingredients.title: Four ingredients we come back to
ingredients.aloeDesc: Cold-pressed within 6 hours of harvest. The backbone of half the shop.
ingredients.honeyDesc: From three small apiaries in the Galilee. Clear, slow, never heated.
ingredients.propolisDesc: The bees' own pharmacy. We tincture it ourselves.
ingredients.oliveDesc: Single-grove oil, pressed at 27°C to keep the phenols living.

q1.text: The aloe heat lotion saved my mother's shoulders. I've re-ordered four times this year.

q2.text: The package looks like Yarit wrapped it in her kitchen. Because she did.

q3.text: The Galilee honey is the best thing in my pantry. Full stop.

shop.title: The shop
shop.subtitle: {count} products
shop.description: We're still building the catalog. Soon you'll be able to browse Yarit's curated selection of natural wellness picks.

meetYarit.heading: Hi, I'm Yarit
meetYarit.body: Copaia is my little shop — a place for products I genuinely trust and use every day myself. I'm here to help, answer questions, and find the right thing for you together.

testimonials.heading: Thank you, from the heart
testimonials.subheading: A handful of customers who have been with us for months, and years

t1.name: Michal A.
t1.quote: Yarit has guided me since day one. The products are excellent and I keep coming back — amazing service.

t2.name: Ronit S.
t2.quote: I found exactly what I was looking for at Yarit's, with a detailed personal explanation of every product. Highly recommend!

t3.name: Dana K.
t3.quote: The aloe Yarit sent me changed my skincare routine. Thank you for the spot-on recommendation.

about.title: About
about.heading: Copaia — natural wellness from the heart
about.body: Copaia is the online home of Yarit. Here you'll find a curated range of high-quality natural products Yarit uses and loves — all in one place, with personal guidance and warm service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: We're happy to help
contact.body: Got a question about a product, need advice, or want to order something special? Message Yarit directly.
contact.comingSoon: A contact form is coming soon

footer.brandBlurb: A small shop of natural wellness, carefully chosen and sent directly from Yarit.
footer.newsletterBody: Occasional notes from Yarit — a new product, a recommendation. No noise, no spam.

auth.loginSubheading: Welcome back. First time here? Use "Forgot password" to set a password for the account that was created automatically at checkout.
